'''鈭歝h-v-r''' ('''kachavar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pearce|pearce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pearce|pearce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-v-r
|-
! Lemma
| kachavar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichavar|thichavar]] || [[word:jichavar|jichavar]] || [[word:shichavar|shichavar]] || [[word:kichavar|kichavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchavar|thuthuchavar]] || [[word:jujuchavar|jujuchavar]] || [[word:shushuchavar|shushuchavar]] || [[word:kukuchavar|kukuchavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchavar|thuchavar]] || [[word:juchavar|juchavar]] || [[word:shuchavar|shuchavar]] || [[word:kuchavar|kuchavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchavar|thuchavar]] || [[word:juchavar|juchavar]] || [[word:shuchavar|shuchavar]] || [[word:kuchavar|kuchavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechavar|thechavar]] || [[word:jechavar|jechavar]] || [[word:shechavar|shechavar]] || [[word:kechavar|kechavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochavar|thothochavar]] || [[word:jojochavar|jojochavar]] || [[word:shoshochavar|shoshochavar]] || [[word:kokochavar|kokochavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochavar|thochavar]] || [[word:jochavar|jochavar]] || [[word:shochavar|shochavar]] || [[word:kochavar|kochavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochavar|thochavar]] || [[word:jochavar|jochavar]] || [[word:shochavar|shochavar]] || [[word:kochavar|kochavar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]] || [[word:chavar|chavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chavar|th忙chavar]] || [[word:j忙chavar|j忙chavar]] || [[word:sh忙chavar|sh忙chavar]] || [[word:k忙chavar|k忙chavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachavar|thathachavar]] || [[word:jajachavar|jajachavar]] || [[word:shashachavar|shashachavar]] || [[word:kakachavar|kakachavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachavar|thachavar]] || [[word:jachavar|jachavar]] || [[word:shachavar|shachavar]] || [[word:kachavar|kachavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachavar|thachavar]] || [[word:jachavar|jachavar]] || [[word:shachavar|shachavar]] || [[word:kachavar|kachavar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachavar|shachavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachavar|goshachavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachavar|gokishachavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachavarn眉|shachavarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachavarnkn眉|goshachavarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachavarn眉|gokishachavarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachavarsh毛|shachavarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachavarnksh毛|goshachavarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachavarsh毛|gokishachavarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachavarro|shachavarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachavarnkro|goshachavarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachavarro|gokishachavarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachavarmu|shachavarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachavarnkmu|goshachavarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachavarmu|gokishachavarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachavarsher|shachavarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachavarnksher|goshachavarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachavarsher|gokishachavarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachavarng|shachavarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachavarnkng|goshachavarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachavarng|gokishachavarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachavarya|shachavarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachavarnkya|goshachavarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachavarya|gokishachavarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachavaryam|shachavaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachavarnkyam|goshachavarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachavaryam|gokishachavaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachavarn眉sh毛|shachavarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachavarnkn眉sh毛|goshachavarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachavarn眉sh毛|gokishachavarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachavarn眉ro|shachavarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachavarnkn眉ro|goshachavarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachavarn眉ro|gokishachavarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachavarn眉mu|shachavarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachavarnkn眉mu|goshachavarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachavarn眉mu|gokishachavarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachavarsh毛n眉|shachavarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachavarnksh毛n眉|goshachavarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachavarsh毛n眉|gokishachavarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachavarsh毛ro|shachavarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachavarnksh毛ro|goshachavarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachavarsh毛ro|gokishachavarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachavarsh毛mu|shachavarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachavarnksh毛mu|goshachavarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachavarsh毛mu|gokishachavarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachavarron眉|shachavarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachavarnkron眉|goshachavarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachavarron眉|gokishachavarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachavarrosh毛|shachavarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachavarnkrosh毛|goshachavarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachavarrosh毛|gokishachavarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachavarromu|shachavarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachavarnkromu|goshachavarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachavarromu|gokishachavarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachavarmun眉|shachavarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachavarnkmun眉|goshachavarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachavarmun眉|gokishachavarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachavarmush毛|shachavarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachavarnkmush毛|goshachavarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachavarmush毛|gokishachavarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachavarmuro|shachavarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachavarnkmuro|goshachavarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachavarmuro|gokishachavarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
